name: io.github.thomenz/brdata-mcp
description: Brazilian company, risk & public-tender data (CNPJ, CEIS/CNEP, PNCP) as x402-paid agent tools.

environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: 0x private key of a DEDICATED wallet holding USDC on Base (pays per call). Paid tools 402 without it; free validate_cnpj still works.

environmentVariables.name: BRDATA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of a brdata Worker. Defaults to the hosted production API.
